summary: Completed comprehensive testing of CEFIN design update. All 9 required features tested successfully including homepage design, user forms, question flow, results page, admin functionality, and Spanish localization. Design implementation verified with proper CEFIN colors and typography.
passed_tests: Homepage loads with CEFIN design (dark navy #0F1219, burgundy red #C41E3A)
Spanish text throughout application ('Evaluación Fiscal e Innovación', 'Cuéntanos sobre ti')
Montserrat font for headings, Open Sans for body text implemented correctly
User info form with CEFIN dark styling (input backgrounds #252B3B)
Complete question flow with CEFIN red selection states working
Assessment submission and redirect to results page functioning
Results page shows correct level with CEFIN color scheme
VSL video container present and working
Calendly correctly hidden for Level 1 users (as designed)
Admin login/registration with CEFIN design working
Admin dashboard with CEFIN branding ('CEFIN Admin') functioning
Dashboard statistics: 19 total, 9 completed, 7 abandoned users displayed
Level distribution stats (N1: 6, N2: 0, N3: 3, N4: 0, N5: 3) working
Search functionality in admin dashboard working
Status filter (Todos/Completados/Abandonados) working
Level filter (Todos los Niveles/Nivel 1-5) working
CSV export functionality working
User table with 19 populated rows displaying correctly
Status badges (Completado/Abandonado) with proper CEFIN colors
Level badges with CEFIN color scheme working
Admin logout functionality working
Backend API tests: 19/19 tests passed (100% success rate)
Mock integrations (ActiveCampaign, WhatsApp) triggering correctly
Score calculation and level assignment working properly
User capture and assessment submission flow working end-to-end
